accurate.why: All claims match the bill text (dates, GAO opinion, CRA disapproval) and verified context (BLM, Montana RMP amendment).

no_hallucinations.why: Added context (BLM, GAO, CRA) is accurate; no fabricated or contradictory claims.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as a CRA disapproval nullifying the BLM Miles City RMP amendment.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule is rendered to have no force or effect under the Congressional Review Act (chapter 8 of title 5).

exceptions_conditions.why: Correctly captures the key condition that GAO's opinion established the action's status as a reviewable rule under the CRA.

effective_dates.why: Accurately states the rule's issuance (Nov. 20, 2024), GAO/Record dates, passage, and approval date of Dec. 11, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the bill's sole operative effect—disapproval and nullification of the specified BLM rule.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, factual recounting without advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across purpose, rule identification, and procedural history.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: BLM, GAO, the Congressional Review Act, and the rule title are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: Dates stated (Nov. 20, 2024; June 25/26, 2025; Sept. 3 and Oct. 8, 2025; Dec. 11, 2025) all match the record.
